name: @xds/vibe-tests
description: Vibeability test harness for measuring LLM component system usage

scripts.test:xds: yarn generate:skill-doc && SKILL_DOC=.generated/xds-skill.md tsx src/cli.ts run
scripts.test:xds:sample: yarn generate:skill-doc && SKILL_DOC=.generated/xds-skill.md tsx src/cli.ts run --sample 10
scripts.test:xds:holdout: yarn generate:skill-doc && SKILL_DOC=.generated/xds-skill.md tsx src/cli.ts run --holdout
scripts.test:ci: yarn generate:skill-doc && SKILL_DOC=.generated/xds-skill.md tsx src/cli.ts run --sample 10
